name: mb_dmiss
m5_band: miss-driven CPI >= 1.30 AND abs-cyc within tightened tol vs golden
note: D-cache-miss cycle check. Stride a load by one 32-byte line through a 32 KB buffer (1024 lines >> 256-line 8KB/2-way D-cache), so every load touches a fresh, already-evicted line -> 100% D-cache miss, each adding dmiss=8 cycles -> CPI~2.5. Buffer is 32-byte aligned (NO misalign +3), pure reads (read-allocate), so the elevation is purely the miss penalty. p5trace.so golden: dcache_miss 100.0%, icache_miss 0.02%, misalign 0.
